title: CDPH modified Artic v3 primers for SARS-CoV-2 sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dmkpa","text":"This protocol lists the primer bed file for a modified Artic v3 set for SARS-CoV-2 sequencing.   Two primers have been added to reduce dropouts.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The attached bed file is a modified Artic v3 primer location list for SARS-CoV-2, used for sequencing by California Dept. of Public Health Viral and Rickettsial Disease Laboratory during the COVID-19 pandemic. CDPH_VRDL_Artic_v3.alt.bed
creator: John Bell
